headline: Alliant Energy Corporation Declares Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
summary: MADISON, Wis., April 16, 2026--The Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) Board of Directors yesterday declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5350 per share payable on May 15, 2026, to shareowners of record as of the close of business on April 30, 2026.
